query:
-- Verify archived vs current split
SELECT billingPeriod, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost
FROM services
GROUP BY billingPeriod
ORDER BY billingPeriod;

-- Confirm archived services are all Telstra with no customer link
SELECT provider, status, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM services
WHERE billingPeriod = 'archived'
GROUP BY provider, status;

-- Confirm current Telstra services look right
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(monthlyCost) as cost
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Telstra' AND (billingPeriod IS NULL OR billingPeriod != 'archived')
GROUP BY status;
